kill_fact: The catalyst itself survives independent verification (veligrotug BLA, Priority Review, PDUFA target action date June 30, 2026, confirmed via Viridian IR + multiple trade press; not yet acted on as of 2026-06-19/22), but TWO load-bearing facts in the bull dossier are FALSE and soften the setup. (1) DILUTION/DEBT THE THESIS DENIES: the dossier insists 'no forced-dilution,' 'no financing contingency,' 'no debt maturity wall,' 'no raise required before June 30,' and 'funded to profitability.' Viridian in fact closed a ~$350M dilutive raise on/around May 5-11, 2026 ($250M 1.75% convertible senior notes due 2032 + ~$100M common/Series B preferred), used in part to repay a ~$50.4M Hercules SECURED loan — so there is recent dilution AND debt, post-dating the stale Q1 (Mar 31) $762M balance sheet the floor is built on. The ~$8 floor uses an out-of-date share count (~110M) and ignores the new converts/preferred. (2) The bull's entire 'dislocation' is built on REVEAL-1 (subcutaneous elegrobart) being an 'UNRELATED FAILURE'/'disappointment' that 'shows the platform is not bulletproof.' REVEAL-1 actually MET its primary endpoint (proptosis responders 54% Q4W / 63% Q8W vs 18% placebo) and REVEAL-2 was POSITIVE (announced May 5, 2026). The 32% Mar-30 drop was a below-elevated-expectations reaction, not a failed trial. The asymmetry (live dated FDA catalyst, cash-backstopped floor, price ~$16.6 well below ~$35 event target) is REAL, but the floor is softer and the 'clean mispricing' narrative is overstated; it does not earn conviction 5.
corrections: Floor leg: do NOT use the stale Q1 $762M / ~110M-share net-cash figure as if untouched into the catalyst. Viridian raised ~$350M of DILUTIVE securities (May 2026: $250M converts due 2032 + ~$100M equity/Series B preferred) and repaid a ~$50.4M Hercules SECURED loan — so 'no dilution / no debt / no raise before June 30 / funded-to-profitability' is REFUTED; share count is ~102.5M basic / ~116.8M as-converted at Mar 31 and rises further post-raise. The cash backstop still exists (and is arguably larger post-raise) but per-share floor must reflect the higher share/convert count, not ~$6-7. REVEAL-1/elegrobart was NOT a failure — it HIT its primary endpoint and REVEAL-2 (May 5, 2026) was positive; the bull's 'unrelated SC failure created the dislocation' framing is a mischaracterization (it was an expectations miss/tinnitus-safety read-through, not a clinical miss). Live price ~$16.6 (Jun 19, 2026), not $16.35. Catalyst is single-asset binary: a CRL (CMC or IGF-1R class-effect hearing/tinnitus/hyperglycemia) gaps toward the cash floor — defined-risk but real.
evidence: Viridian Therapeutics IR / Healio (2025-12-22 to 2025-12-23): BLA for veligrotug accepted with Priority Review; PDUFA target action date June 30, 2026 — catalyst is live, dated, FDA-controlled, not yet acted on as of 2026-06-19.

SEC Form 424B5, Viridian Therapeutics (filed ~2026-05-05, priced ~2026-05-11): concurrent public offering of $250M 1.75% Convertible Senior Notes due 2032 + ~$100M common/Series B preferred (~$350M gross), proceeds used in part to repay ~$50.4M Hercules SECURED loan — REFUTES the dossier's 'no dilution / no debt / no pre-catalyst raise.'

Viridian Q1 2026 results (businesswire/IR, 2026-05-05): cash + marketable securities $762.2M as of Mar 31, 2026; ~102.5M common shares (~116.8M as-converted) — the floor's source balance sheet PRE-DATES the May raise.

Viridian REVEAL-1 (Mar 2026) and REVEAL-2 (announced 2026-05-05) topline: elegrobart MET primary endpoints (proptosis ~54-63% vs ~15-18% placebo) — REFUTES the bull's characterization of the SC program as a 'failure'/'disappointment' driving an 'unrelated' mispricing.
